description_long: This is a modern mountain bicycle featuring a robust, angular frame with a matte black and yellow color scheme. It is equipped with front and rear suspension systems, disc brakes, and thick, knobby tires designed for off-road and urban terrain. The handlebars are flat and wide, providing stability and control, while the seat is a standard saddle mounted on an adjustable post. The drivetrain includes a multi-gear system with a visible rear derailleur and pedals with reflectors. Fenders are present above both wheels, and the frame appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely aluminum or steel, with some plastic and rubber components. The overall design is sporty and functional, suitable for both city commuting and recreational riding.
description: A black and yellow mountain bicycle with a sturdy frame, front and rear suspension, disc brakes, and flat handlebars. It features thick tires, fenders, and a standard saddle, designed for both urban and off-road use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full frame, drivetrain, suspension, and both wheels with fenders.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat handlebars, front suspension fork, and the width of the tires.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the frame geometry, rear derailleur, and seat post details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back wheel, rear fender, and the alignment of the pedals and seat.
